name: AI21 Jamba
note: First production-grade hybrid Mamba-Transformer MoE base model, 12B/52B active/total, 256K context fitting 140K tokens on one 80GB GPU.

results.notes: ARC-Easy (ARC-E, 0-shot) score from Table 2 of the original Jamba technical report -- not present on the HF model card, which only lists ARC-Challenge.
HumanEval pass@1 score from Table 2 of the original Jamba technical report -- not present on the HF model card, which omits code-generation results.

verificationNotes: Confirmed via ai21.com/blog/announcing-jamba/ (published 2024-03-28: Apache-2.0 open weights, 256K context window, 140K tokens on a single 80GB GPU) and HF model card ai21labs/Jamba-v0.1 (12B active/52B total MoE, hybrid Mamba-Transformer-MoE). All 8 benchmark rows (MMLU 67.4, HellaSwag 87.1, ARC-Challenge 64.4, GSM8K/CoT 59.9, WinoGrande 82.5, BBH 45.4, PIQA 83.2, TruthfulQA 46.4) were fetched directly from the HF model card's academic benchmarks table and match exactly. All fields left unchanged.
